message:
feat(e2e): Enhance Master E2E Test Suite with comprehensive logging (P6.14)

Add E2eLogger integration and HTML report generation to the master E2E test suite:

- Integrate E2eLogger for structured JSONL output with environment capture
- Add phase tracking (Workflow, Authentication, Security tests)
- Add test lifecycle events (start/end with duration and status)
- Add HTML report generation with styled output
- Add programmatic test runner for CI integration
- Add run_with_logging wrapper for instrumented test execution
- Fix clippy warnings in e2e_log.rs

All 15 tests pass with clean cargo clippy.

Closes: coding_agent_session_search-i5wp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
